commands.name: event
commands.description: Configure and view events.

options.name: create
options.description: Make a new event

options.name: name
options.description: The name of the event, no spaces allowed.

options.name: day
options.description: The date (DD/MM/YYYY) that you want it to go off

options.name: time
options.description: The time (HH:MM) that you want it to go off. This needs to be in 24hr format

options.name: message
options.description: The message that you want the event to spit back out

options.name: repeat
options.description: Lets you set a duration with the format of 00d00h00m. It will repeat after that time has passed.

options.name: repeatday
options.description: Lets you set it to repeat on set days with the format of 0,0,0,0,0.

options.name: channel
options.description: Set which channel the event will announce on

options.name: countdown
options.description: Set to use the countdown or not (Configured in setconf)

options.name: createjson
options.description: Create new event(s), inputted as a json code block

options.name: json
options.description: The json formatted text.

options.name: delete
options.description: Delete an event

options.name: name
options.description: The unique name of the event you want to delete

options.name: edit
options.description: Create new event(s), inputted as a json code block

options.name: event_name
options.description: The name of the event you want to edit

options.name: name
options.description: The new name of the event, no spaces allowed.

options.name: day
options.description: The date (DD/MM/YYYY) that you want it to go off

options.name: time
options.description: The time (HH:MM) that you want it to go off. This needs to be in 24hr format

options.name: message
options.description: The message that you want the event to spit back out

options.name: repeat
options.description: Lets you set a duration with the format of 00d00h00m. (Not compatible with repeatday)

options.name: repeatday
options.description: Lets you set it to repeat on set days with the format of 0,0,0,0,0. (Not compatible with repeat)

options.name: channel
options.description: Set which channel the event will announce on

options.name: countdown
options.description: Set to use the countdown or not (Configured in setconf)

options.name: trigger
options.description: Trigger the selected event

options.name: name
options.description: The unique name of the event you want to trigger

options.name: view
options.description: View your event(s)

options.name: name
options.description: The unique name of the event you want to see.

options.name: minimal
options.description: Show the event(s), but without the message.

options.name: page_num
options.description: Set it to paginate the events, showing 5 events at a time.

options.name: filter
options.description: Show only events that match the filter

options.description: The poll option you want to vote for
